title: Extension Tab Scan Flow
interaction_flow: Trigger → ServiceWorker: scan request (via port.onMessage 'scan' OR runtime.onMessage {action:'scan'} OR webNavigation.onCompleted)
ServiceWorker → tabState: getState(tabId) — check csInjected flag
[if not injected] ServiceWorker → chrome.scripting: executeScript({ target:{tabId}, files:['content/content-script.js'], injectImmediately:true })
chrome.scripting → ContentScript: inject content-script.js into tab
ServiceWorker → chrome.storage.sync: get({ disabledRules, lineLengthMode, spotlightBlur, autoScan })
ServiceWorker → ServiceWorker: build config { disabledRules?, lineLengthMax (80|120), spotlightBlur }
chrome.tabs → ContentScript: deliver scan message with config
ContentScript → ServiceWorker: runtime.sendMessage({ action:'findings', findings:[] }) [async, after scan completes]
ServiceWorker → tabState: state.findings = msg.findings; state.injected = true
ServiceWorker → PanelPort: notifyPanels(tabId, { action:'findings', findings }) — iterates panelPorts Map
ServiceWorker → chrome.runtime: sendMessage({ action:'findings-updated', tabId, findings }) [broadcast for popup]

key_functions.sendScanToTab(tabId): async; calls ensureContentScriptInjected then buildScanConfig, then chrome.tabs.sendMessage with {action:'scan', config}
key_functions.ensureContentScriptInjected(tabId): async; checks state.csInjected, if false runs chrome.scripting.executeScript for content-script.js; returns bool
key_functions.buildScanConfig(): async; calls getSettings(), maps lineLengthMode→lineLengthMax (lax=120, strict=80), passes spotlightBlur and disabledRules
key_functions.getSettings(): async; chrome.storage.sync.get with defaults: disabledRules:[], lineLengthMode:'strict', spotlightBlur:true, autoScan:'panel'
key_functions.notifyPanels(tabId, message): sync; looks up panelPorts Map by tabId, iterates Set<port>, calls port.postMessage(message); swallows disconnected-port errors
key_functions.updateBadge(tabId): sync; reads findings count from tabState, calls chrome.action.setBadgeText and setBadgeBackgroundColor

trigger_paths: Panel port connected with no findings → sendScanToTab (auto-scan fallback)
Sidebar port (impeccable-sidebar-{tabId}) connected with no findings → sendScanToTab
runtime.onMessage {action:'disabled-rules-changed'} → sendScanToTab for all injected tabs
webNavigation.onCompleted (frameId=0, tab in devtoolsTabs, wasActive) → setTimeout(sendScanToTab, 300)

state_management.panelPorts: Map<tabId, Set<Port>> — panel + sidebar ports share this map
state_management.devtoolsTabs: Set<tabId> — tracks tabs with DevTools open

key_relationships: ServiceWorker owns tabState and panelPorts (module-level singletons)
ContentScript is injected lazily by ensureContentScriptInjected via chrome.scripting
Findings flow: ContentScript → ServiceWorker (runtime.onMessage) → tabState + badge + panelPorts + popup broadcast
important_notes: Content script injected on-demand (not static manifest entry) to minimize footprint. csInjected flag prevents double-injection within the same page lifecycle. Page navigation resets csInjected=false (reload destroys content script). notifyPanels covers both panel.js and sidebar pane ports. sendMessage calls use .catch(()=>{}) to silently handle missing tabs/content scripts.
